accepted.reason: In-place position update with periodic wrapping is a compact numerical loop that maps cleanly to Python->Cython optimization.

accepted.path: /ipynbs/python性能优化/使用Cython优化python程序的性能/使用cython编写python模块/testomp.pyx
accepted.reason: Thresholded elementwise exponential transform is a simple vector kernel useful for loop-optimization traces.
Bounding-box accumulation over pin coordinates is a small deterministic loop kernel with clear performance semantics.

skipped.reason: Very small data container class; too little computational content for GRPO optimization training.
Depends on project-specific hash and calibration tables, so it is not a clean standalone kernel example.
Algorithm family is already represented by existing string subsequence kernel examples in the unpaired set.
Large parser/tree framework with implicit constants and object graph behavior; not a focused numeric optimization kernel.
Python 2-era C-extension binding around external S-expression parser internals, not suitable as standalone conversion target.
Wrapper class for external C++ trajectory objects, dominated by binding logic instead of portable compute kernels.
Fractal iteration pattern already exists in current unpaired examples, so adding it would be low-diversity duplication.
